# CapabilityNegotiation.NotificationRequiredCapabilityMap property

Maps a server-to-client notification to the capability/sub-flag that gates it (§6.2, §6.3). Mirrors TS `NOTIFICATION_REQUIRED_CAPABILITY`.

public static IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> NotificationRequiredCapabilityMap { get; }
